历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category are 10946 → 11391 → 15751 → 13928 → 12680. In 2023, there was a significant drop (about 4360 places lower than 2022), in 2024 it moved up by about 1823 places, and in 2025 it continued to move up by about 1248 places, showing a continuous upward trend in the last two years, with a baseline ranking of about 12680 in 2025. The university's enrollment plan for Physics Category in Anhui Province: 335 in 2021, 334 in 2022, 333 in 2023, 317 in 2024, 328 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 323, a decrease of 5 from 2025 (a reduction of about 1.5%), which somewhat alleviates competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Wuhan University of Technology is a 211 Project and Double First-Class university; its Soft Science China University Ranking is about 54th in 2026, fluctuating between 48th and 55th in recent years, placing it at an upper-middle level among 211 universities. In 2026, the reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, mainly due to campus safety incidents (unidentified biological activity at Nanhu Campus), which may slightly affect candidates' willingness to apply. Its Douyin popularity ranking is 98th, rated as average, with no obvious popularity signals. No historical record of admission gaps was found. Materials Science and Engineering (A), Transportation Engineering (A-), and Mechanical Engineering (A-) are representative advantageous disciplines, directly corresponding to the university's enrollment majors such as Materials, Transportation, and Mechanical Engineering, which have a positive attraction for related major applications.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information, and Artificial Intelligence continue to have high social popularity, strongly attracting high-scoring candidates. In 2026, the number of Physics Category candidates in Anhui Province is about 313,000, a decrease of about 2.4% from 2025, slightly reducing competition. Wuhan University of Technology is located in Wuhan, Hubei, geographically adjacent to Anhui with convenient transportation, and has high regional acceptance. The university has a large enrollment scale in Anhui Province (over 300 students), making it a key source province.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 12680, the 1.5% enrollment reduction in Physics Category in 2026 (alleviating competition), the total candidate decrease of about 2.4% (further alleviating competition), and the somewhat negative reputation signals; taking into account the continuous upward trend in rankings over the past two years (actual intensification of competition) and the offsetting effects of enrollment reduction/candidate decrease, after a minor adjustment, the predicted minimum ranking is about 12534, with a range of 12034–13034.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking is about 12534, with a range of 12034–13034. If your ranking is within the range, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as safety options. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (within 12034), you can focus on aiming for top Tier 1 majors such as Computer Category, Electronic Information Category, Excellent Talent Class, etc. If your ranking is near the upper limit of the range (around 13034), it is recommended to mainly choose Tier 3 safety majors, while also considering Tier 2 moderate majors.

学校层次与声誉.text: Wuhan University of Technology is a 211 Project and Double First-Class university; ranked about 54th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, known for science and engineering, with relatively small liberal arts programs; the 2026 reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, mainly involving campus safety incidents, which may slightly affect candidates' willingness to apply; Douyin popularity ranks 98th, rated as average; no signs of admission cutoff anomalies in historical records; Materials Science and Engineering (A), Transportation Engineering (A-), and Mechanical Engineering (A-) are its advantageous disciplines, but the History Category enrollment majors (Law, Economics, Business Administration, Foreign Languages and Literature, etc.) have low correlation with these advantageous disciplines.
